name: Sweet-And-Sour Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beans, water, bay leaf and cloves in a saucepan.
2. Cook until the beans are tender, about 3 minutes.
3. Drain off the water.
4. Add the vinegar and margarine. Saute for 3 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf and cloves.
6. Sprinkle on the sweetener and serve.
Serves 4
